title: Business Computation
catalogDescription: Sharpens the computational skills of students preparing to enter business employment. Provides a thorough review of basic arithmetic operations and their application to typical business problems. Also provides broad consumer education covering topics such as bank reconciliations, discounts, markups and markdowns, payroll, simple and compound interest and present value. Prerequisite: Eligible for MATH 062 , or BTAC 110 with a grade of 2.0 or higher; or instructor's permission.
